run.command: eval:phase-63-live-closure -- --benchmark-root ~/.goodmemory-beam --profile goodmemory-rules-only --evidence-pack --recall-report <run-p5-beam-rules-fitted-recall>/recall-diagnostic.json --resume --run-id run-p5-beam-closure-rules-abstfmt-gpt54judge (GOODMEMORY_JUDGE_* env -> gpt-5.4 on the primary gateway; no-pack ablation: same command without --evidence-pack, run-id run-p5-beam-closure-rules-nopack-gpt54judge)

model.judgeModel: gpt-5.4 (cross-version, SAME family as the answer model - not a cross-family judge)

metrics.primary: answer accuracy (100K, 400 cases; judged by gpt-5.4 - a different model but the same GPT family as the answerer; the cross-family gemini-judged datapoint is 0.680 on the union16 profile with the pre-abstention-fix prompt)

coverage.note: fitted evidence-chat recall 0.9621 vs generalization floor 0.6822. P5 general-lever recall matrix 2026-07-04 (all 148 registered narrow gates disabled, 355 evidence cases, committed recall diagnostic + createMemory seam): rules-only floor 0.68220 (reproduces banked 0.6822 bit-exactly); hybrid-hash 0.64533; hybrid-hash+bm25Ranking 0.64533 (identical - BM25 is a no-op on BEAM recall); union16 (provider embedding text-embedding-3-small + retrieval.semanticCandidates topK 16, per-text 16k-char prefix embedding) 0.85293; bm25+union16 0.85293 (identical). Semantic candidate-generation UNION lifts the generalization floor +17.1pt with a general, shipped opt-in mechanism. ANSWER-SIDE FOLLOW-UP 2026-07-05 (user-directed: all chat on the primary gateway; judge gpt-5.4 = different model but SAME FAMILY as the gpt-5.5 answerer, cross-version not cross-family): abstention-format prompt fix (commit 5cee12c, teaches the benchmark's templated abstention sentence; abstention family 29/40 -> 38/40) measured on the full 400 with the rules-only profile (fitted recall 0.96206 re-verified): pack+abstfmt 0.7225 (289/400) vs no-pack ablation 0.5725 (229/400), executionFailures 0 both, run ids run-p5-beam-closure-rules-abstfmt-gpt54judge / run-p5-beam-closure-rules-nopack-gpt54judge - the evidence pack contributes +15pt under the cross-version judge, replacing the stale same-model-judge no-pack baseline 0.56. NEGATIVE RESULT 2026-07-05: clause-level contradiction-pair PINNING in the evidence pack (split turns into clauses, lexically pick the denial+affirmative pair, instruct the model to use exactly those sides) was slice-validated and REJECTED - it recovered 4 of the 11 wrong contradiction cases but regressed 13 of the 29 previously-correct ones (net -9 on the 40-case family; run ids run-p5-beam-contradiction-clause-fix-slice / run-p5-beam-contradiction-regression-slice, same gpt-5.4 judge; rejected diff archived at reports/eval/research/phase-63/beam/contradiction-clause-pinning-rejected.patch). The turn-level 'mushy snippet' guide lets the answer model choose the pair better than a lexical clause heuristic; any future clause-level guide change must re-validate against BOTH slices.

claimBoundary.reason: Best measured answer accuracy 2026-07-05: 0.7225 (289/400, execFails 0) with rules-only + evidence pack + abstention-format prompt under a gpt-5.4 judge - CROSS-VERSION but SAME-FAMILY as the gpt-5.5 answerer (the primary gateway serves only GPT-family chat; per user directive OpenRouter is not used). The strongest-judge datapoint remains the 2026-07-04 cross-family run: 0.680 (272/400, gemini-3.5-flash judge, union16 profile, old prompt) - same-model inflation was quantified there at ~+1.5pt vs the 0.695 gpt-5.5-judged checkpoint. Still BELOW the >=0.75 public target (0.7225 best), so internal_evidence stands. Remaining wrong-answer families under the cross-version judge (111): instruction_following 26, event_ordering 22, summarization 16, contradiction-pair-selection 11, multi_session 9, knowledge_update 8. Dual recall for the union16 profile: fitted 0.9718 vs generalization 0.8529 (ADR-005 gap 28pt -> 11.9pt); rules-only fitted 0.96206. Remaining blockers: below 0.75 target; dataset license unverified; judge is same-family (a cross-family judge needs an external endpoint - gemini feasibility recipe banked, requires credits). Lever matrix (BM25 no-op; union16 +17.1pt generalization) and the pack ablation (+15pt, 0.5725 -> 0.7225) are in coverage.note.
